name: the red-team pack feeds the C-23 coordinated-disclosure evidence record
command: printf 'resource x {}\n' > a.tf && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/redteam-review.sh" --artifact a.tf --emit json 2>/dev/null >o.json; node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("o.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.feeds&&j.feeds.c23?0:1)' && echo w13-feeds-c23 1>&2
